description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a black synthetic fixed stock and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The receiver and barrel are finished in matte black, while the handguard area displays a wood-textured or brown polymer section, adding a touch of traditional styling. The rifle is equipped with standard iron sights, with the front sight post and rear notch clearly visible. A detachable box magazine is fitted just ahead of the trigger guard, and the barrel extends forward with a simple flash hider or muzzle device at the tip. The overall build suggests a robust, utilitarian firearm suitable for urban or tactical scenarios. The surface finish is mostly matte, with some areas appearing slightly smoother, and the construction is primarily metal with some polymer or wood components.
description: A black rifle with a fixed stock, wood-textured handguard, iron sights, and a detachable box magazine. The design blends modern and traditional elements with a matte finish.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the narrow barrel profile and front sight post.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length, fixed stock, wood-textured handguard, pistol grip, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the stock's width and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the same features including the handguard, magazine, and iron sights.
